le-planner.description: Spec and planning agent for Loop Engineering. Analyzes tasks, reads constraints, produces structured plans.

le-builder.description: Code implementation agent for Loop Engineering. Implements approved plans faithfully.

le-reviewer.description: Code review agent for Loop Engineering. Reviews quality, edge cases, conventions.

le-tester.description: Test generation and execution agent for Loop Engineering. Writes and runs tests following RED-GREEN-REFACTOR.

le-security.description: Security audit agent for Loop Engineering. SAST, dependency checks, secrets detection.

le-deployer.description: Deploy agent for Loop Engineering. Build, stage, deploy with canary, verify, rollback.

le.description: Run Loop Engineering on a task. Loads the loop-engineering skill and initiates spec→build→verify→ship lifecycle.

le-verify.description: Verify the loop-engineering package. Loads le-verify skill and runs 6-step self-check: structure → frontmatter → contracts → subagents → integration → delivery.

le-run.description: Run a Loop Engineering workflow step directly. Usage: /le-run verify:package
